outputs.main.sas:
library(admiral)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(haven)
library(metacore)
library(metatools)
library(xportr)

# Read SDTM datasets
ae <- read_xpt("sdtm/ae.xpt")
adsl <- read_xpt("adam/adsl.xpt")

# Read suppae if exists
suppae <- tryCatch(
  read_xpt("sdtm/suppae.xpt"),
  error = function(e) NULL
)

# Merge SUPPAE with AE if exists
if (!is.null(suppae)) {
  suppae_wide <- suppae %>%
    filter(QNAM != "") %>%
    select(STUDYID, RDOMAIN, USUBJID, IDVAR, IDVARVAL, QNAM, QVAL, QLABEL) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      id_cols = c(STUDYID, RDOMAIN, USUBJID, IDVARVAL),
      names_from = QNAM,
      values_from = QVAL
    ) %>%
    rename(AESEQ = IDVARVAL)
  
  ae <- ae %>%
    left_join(suppae_wide, by = c("STUDYID", "USUBJID", "AESEQ"))
}

# Merge with ADSL
adae <- ae %>%
  derive_vars_merged(
    dataset_add = adsl,
    new_vars = adsl_vars,
    by_vars = exprs(STUDYID, USUBJID)
  )

# Derive analysis start date (ADT) and analysis end date (ADTM)
adae <- adae %>%
  derive_vars_dt(
    new_vars_prefix = "AST",
    dtc = AESTDTC,
    highest_imputation = "D"
  ) %>%
  derive_vars_dt(
    new_vars_prefix = "AEN",
    dtc = AEENDTC,
    highest_imputation = "D"
  )

# Derive analysis start day (ASTDY) and end day (AENDY)
adae <- adae %>%
  derive_vars_dy(
    reference_date = TRTSDT,
    source_vars = exprs(ASTDT, AENDT)
  )

# Derive treatment emergent flag (TRTEMFL)
adae <- adae %>%
  derive_var_trtemfl(
    trt_start_date = TRTSDT,
    trt_end_date = TRTEDT,
    end_window = 30
  )

# Derive analysis severity (ASEV)
adae <- adae %>%
  mutate(
    ASEV = case_when(
      AESEV == "MILD" ~ "MILD",
      AESEV == "MODERATE" ~ "MODERATE",
      AESEV == "SEVERE" ~ "SEVERE",
      TRUE ~ AESEV
    )
  )

# Derive analysis relationship (AREL)
adae <- adae %>%
  mutate(
    AREL = case_when(
      AEREL %in% c("RELATED", "PROBABLY RELATED", "POSSIBLY RELATED") ~ "RELATED",
      AEREL %in% c("NOT RELATED") ~ "NOT RELATED",
      TRUE ~ AEREL
    )
  )

# Derive custom query variable (CQ01NAM)
adae <- adae %>%
  mutate(
    CQ01NAM = case_when(
      grepl("CARDIAC|HEART", AEDECOD, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "CARDIAC EVENTS",
      grepl("HEPATIC|LIVER", AEDECOD, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "HEPATIC EVENTS",
      grepl("RENAL|KIDNEY", AEDECOD, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "RENAL EVENTS",
      grepl("INFECTION", AEDECOD, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "INFECTIONS",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Derive analysis sequence number (ASEQ)
adae <- adae %>%
  group_by(STUDYID, USUBJID) %>%
  mutate(ASEQ = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()

# Derive analysis value (AVAL) and analysis value character (AVALC)
adae <- adae %>%
  mutate(
    AVALC = ASEV,
    AVAL = case_when(
      ASEV == "MILD" ~ 1,
      ASEV == "MODERATE" ~ 2,
      ASEV == "SEVERE" ~ 3,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

# Derive analysis parameter (PARAM and PARAMCD)
adae <- adae %>%
  mutate(
    PARAMCD = "AESEV",
    PARAM = "Adverse Event Severity"
  )

# Derive analysis flags
adae <- adae %>%
  mutate(
    ANL01FL = if_else(TRTEMFL == "Y", "Y", NA_character_),
    AOCC01FL = if_else(!is.na(CQ01NAM), "Y", NA_character_),
    AOCCFL = "Y",
    AOCCIFL = if_else(AESER == "Y", "Y", NA_character_)
  )

# Derive additional analysis variables
adae <- adae %>%
  mutate(
    APHASE = case_when(
      ASTDT < TRTSDT ~ "SCREENING",
      ASTDT >= TRTSDT & ASTDT <= TRTEDT ~ "TREATMENT",
      ASTDT > TRTEDT ~ "FOLLOW-UP",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Select and order variables
adae <- adae %>%
  select(
    STUDYID, USUBJID, SUBJID, SITEID, AGE, AGEU, SEX, RACE, ETHNIC,
    COUNTRY, TRTSDT, TRTEDT, TRTSDTM, TRTEDTM, TRT01P, TRT01A, TRT01PN, TRT01AN,
    AESEQ, AETERM, AEDECOD, AEBODSYS, AESOC, AESEV, AESER, AEREL, AEACN, AEOUT,
    AESTDTC, AEENDTC, ASTDT, AENDT, ASTDY, AENDY,
    PARAMCD, PARAM, AVAL, AVALC,
    ASEV, AREL, CQ01NAM,
    TRTEMFL, ANL01FL, AOCC01FL, AOCCFL, AOCCIFL, APHASE,
    ASEQ
  )

# Apply variable labels
var_labels <- c(
  STUDYID = "Study Identifier",
  USUBJID = "Unique Subject Identifier",
  SUBJID = "Subject Identifier for the Study",
  SITEID = "Study Site Identifier",
  AGE = "Age",
  AGEU = "Age Units",
  SEX = "Sex",
  RACE = "Race",
  ETHNIC = "Ethnicity",
  COUNTRY = "Country",
  TRTSDT = "Date of First Exposure to Treatment",
  TRTEDT = "Date of Last Exposure to Treatment",
  TRTSDTM = "Datetime of First Exposure to Treatment",
  TRTEDTM = "Datetime of Last Exposure to Treatment",
  TRT01P = "Planned Treatment for Period 01",
  TRT01A = "Actual Treatment for Period 01",
  TRT01PN = "Planned Treatment for Period 01 (N)",
  TRT01AN = "Actual Treatment for Period 01 (N)",
  AESEQ = "Sequence Number",
  AETERM = "Reported Term for the Adverse Event",
  AEDECOD = "Dictionary-Derived Term",
  AEBODSYS = "Body System or Organ Class",
  AESOC = "Primary System Organ Class",
  AESEV = "Severity/Intensity",
  AESER = "Serious Event",
  AEREL = "Causality",
  AEACN = "Action Taken with Study Treatment",
  AEOUT = "Outcome of Adverse Event",
  AESTDTC = "Start Date/Time of Adverse Event",
  AEENDTC = "End Date/Time of Adverse Event",
  ASTDT = "Analysis Start Date",
  AENDT = "Analysis End Date",
  ASTDY = "Analysis Start Relative Day",
  AENDY = "Analysis End Relative Day",
  PARAMCD = "Parameter Code",
  PARAM = "Parameter",
  AVAL = "Analysis Value",
  AVALC = "Analysis Value (C)",
  ASEV = "Analysis Severity/Intensity",
  AREL = "Analysis Causality",
  CQ01NAM = "Customized Query 01 Name",
  TRTEMFL = "Treatment Emergent Analysis Flag",
  ANL01FL = "Analysis Flag 01",
  AOCC01FL = "1st Occurrence within CQ01NAM Flag",
  AOCCFL = "1st Occurrence Flag",
  AOCCIFL = "1st Occurrence of Important Event Flag",
  APHASE = "Phase",
  ASEQ = "Analysis Sequence Number"
)

adae <- adae %>%
  set_variable_labels(.labels = var_labels)

# Write XPT file
write_xpt(
  adae,
  path = "adam/adae.xpt",
  label = "Adverse Events Analysis Dataset",
  strict_checks = FALSE
)
